modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by a help desk analyst during a live phone call and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in symptom-first manner and use an even and factual tone. The writing should have very limited detail and show strong technical proficiency. There should be a few minor typos and some redundant repeated information.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Audio is playing through computer speakers instead of external speakers.

full_description_text: The user reported that audio is not playing correctly. It is coming out of the computer speakers instead of the external speakers they intended to use. This issue occurred while they were trying to change the audio output settings. The problem persists across both Windows and Mac OS environments.
short_description: Audio is playing through computer speakers instead of external speakers.
description: The user reported that audio is not playing correctly. It is coming out of the computer speakers instead of the external speakers they intended to use. This issue occurred while they were trying to change the audio output settings. The problem persists across both Windows and Mac OS environments.
